Role boundary violations (planner computes/answers; premature responses)
Redundant lookups and repeated computations causing inefficiency
Final deliverables incomplete or not directly answering the question (e.g., missing entity names or full lists)
Scope creep by adding unrequested or unanalysed content
Inconsistent naming, formatting, or rounding; no stated rounding policy
Incorrect or unsupported unit conversions and misuse of tools; unverified conversion factors
Calculations not fully chained with explicit tool outputs; missing final intermediate/result values
Introducing values/constants not supported by tool outputs; failure to reference tool results directly
Omission of relevant caveats or context (definitions, variability, assumptions)
Minor numerical inaccuracies in comparative statements or ratios
Initial research not consolidated; failure to gather all relevant entities in a single pass
Poor handling of tool limitations (unclear fallback, repeated unsupported attempts)
Lack of an explicit calculation plan before computing
